name: Cherry Nut Dump Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre heat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 9x13 in. pan.
3. Spread pie filling and crushed pineapple in bottom of pan.
4. Pour dry cake mix evenly over the top.
5. Pour melted butter over cake mix.
6. Sprinkle chopped nuts and shredded coconut on top.
7. Bake for 55 to 65 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
